TITLE_SCREEN - Enum constant in enum class battleship.controller.GameState
The starting state of the game.

The screen between TITLE_SCREEN and GAME.

titleScreenController() - Method in class battleship.view.Battleship
Setup method for the controller objects of controlP5.
toPlayedCards(Cards) - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
After each move with this method, played card is sent to playedCards stack and removed from handCards list.
toString() - Method in class battleship.model.BattleshipGame
A textual representation about the current game state.
toString() - Method in class battleship.model.Cards
A textual representation about the cards and cards information (such as Power of Missile or Defence of Ship) for Example: -White Missile; [W1] -Red Missile with 2 power; [R2] -Shield; (S) -Repair; [+] -Missed; [X] -Destroyer with 2 Defence; [D2] -Cruiser with 2 Defence; [C2]
toString() - Method in class battleship.view.CardsG
A textual representation about the CardsG object.
toString() - Method in class battleship.view.PlayedCardE
A textual representation about the PlayedCardE object.
toString() - Method in class battleship.view.PlayedCardIO
A textual representation about the PlayedCardIO object.

type - Variable in class battleship.model.Cards
Single Variables for Cards object.
